messages.text: Hi Emma! I've been feeling quite stressed lately with work. Do you have any availability this week?
Hello! I understand work stress can be overwhelming. I'm available tomorrow at 2 PM if that works for you. We can discuss some stress management techniques.
Hi David, I saw your profile about anxiety management. I've been dealing with panic attacks recently.
I'm here to help. Panic attacks can be managed with the right techniques. Would you like to schedule a session to discuss coping strategies?
Hello Lisa! I'm interested in learning more about mindfulness meditation.
That's wonderful! Mindfulness can be life-changing. I have some great beginner techniques we can explore together.
